scores.correctness_notes: All core facts match the gold standard: temp_model, deploy, wait with all_active and all_agents_idle, successes=3 default, lambda pattern. Additional details (deploy params, multi-app waiting) are correct extensions.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.wait_timeout as an instance-level attribute (with fallback semantics for wait()) and delay=1.0 as a wait() parameter are not in the gold standard and may not exist. These are minor claims that cannot be verified against the reference.
